metafield_recommendations.detected_as: Emoji-rich benefit bullet points embedded in description (🍑 skin/cellulite benefits, ❤️ blood flow/firming benefits)
metafield_recommendations.note: The description contains structured benefit statements prefixed with emoji icons. Consider extracting these into a metafield of type list.single_line_text_field so section agents can render them as styled benefit blocks rather than raw paragraph text.

metafield_recommendations.detected_as: Subtitle/tagline text: 'Clinically formulated 7 active ingredient formula developed to make you feel good about your cellulite'
metafield_recommendations.note: The leading sentence in the description reads as a marketing subtitle rather than body copy. If the source page renders this separately from the main description, it should be a dedicated metafield.

metafield_recommendations.detected_as: Badge text 'New Maximum Potency Formula' present in product title
metafield_recommendations.note: The title begins with 'New Maximum Potency Formula' which likely renders as a badge or callout on the source page. Consider moving this to a metafield so the product title in Shopify can be cleaner (e.g., 'Lymphatic Drainage Capsules by Sculptiqu') while the badge renders separately.

errors.issue: Extracted variant array is empty. Every Shopify product must have at least one variant. The crawler failed to extract variant data from JSON-LD or the DOM.
errors.resolution: Re-crawl the source URL targeting the product JSON-LD script tag, Shopify's /products/<handle>.json endpoint (https://trysculptique.com/products/lymph-cc-select.json), or the embedded `var meta = {}` / `ShopifyAnalytics.meta` objects. At minimum, one variant with a valid price (integer in cents) is required.

errors.issue: Price is null. No price was extracted for the product or any variant. Without a price, no section agent can render the product price, add-to-cart, or variant selector correctly.
errors.resolution: Obtain the price from the Shopify product JSON endpoint or from the DOM (look for `.price`, `[data-product-price]`, or JSON-LD `offers.price`). Price must be an integer in cents (e.g., 4900 for $49.00).

warnings.issue: Vendor is null. Non-critical but the source page likely uses 'Sculptiqu' or 'Sculptique' as the vendor. Section agents should use product.vendor with a conditional check.
Product type is null. Non-critical. Likely 'Supplement' or 'Health' based on the product name. Section agents should conditionally render product.type.
Featured image has null alt text. Section agents must provide a fallback using product.title as the alt attribute value.
Compare-at price is null. No sale badge or strikethrough price rendering is needed unless variant data reveals otherwise after re-extraction.

Options array is empty. This may indicate a single-variant product (Default Title) or may be a consequence of the missing variant data. After re-extraction, if the product has only one variant with title 'Default Title', the variant selector should be hidden.
Only one product image was extracted. The source page likely has additional images (gallery/carousel). Re-crawl should attempt to capture all product images from the media gallery.
